subcodes.first_line: O Yaḥyá! Today, by God's testimony, they that are nigh unto Him are and have ever been possessed of true riches. Dost thou not behold the Word of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یحیی امروز منتسبین حق بشهاده الله کل غنی بوده و هستند آیا کلمه الهی را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consultation
